ddls:
CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric record */,
  "fold" INTEGER /* Fold number for cross-validation */,
  "precision_0" REAL /* Precision for class 0 */,
  "recall_0" REAL /* Recall for class 0 */,
  "f_score_0" REAL /* F-score for class 0 */,
  "precision_1" REAL /* Precision for class 1 */,
  "recall_1" REAL /* Recall for class 1 */,
  "f_score_1" REAL /* F-score for class 1 */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the metrics */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation associated with the metrics */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "inference_time" REAL /* Time taken to make predictions */,
  "metrics_version" TEXT /* Version of the metrics calculation method */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Decision Tree, Neural Network) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the model was trained on */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model training */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "performance_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the model's performance */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for data scientist, 3 for analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_version" TEXT /* Version of the evaluation process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
